creator: dr.geoff.lockwood@ntlworld.com
text:
I needed help from the forum to get swat going for remote administration of Samba. I had made all the configuration changes I could find in the manual. It was eventually pointed out to me that inetd must be started!

Given that all the rest of the configuration was laid out on a plate, I didn't read the entire Handbook and was stuck for days.

Fix: 

In 30.9.2.1 of the Handbook please add a line to say that inetd must be enabled in rc.conf, as described in 30.2.2
